title: Add Git-native storage feature to kanb.us home page
description: Add a new feature entry highlighting that Kanbus stores everything in the Git repository with no databases or magic indexes to worry about. Only totally-transparent caching. This is a key differentiator: your project data is just files in your repo. Split out from the current 'Realtime Collaboration' feature which currently conflates Git storage with pub/sub messaging. Needs: new entry in features.ts, a new pictogram type in FeaturePictogram.tsx, a new feature detail page, and placement on the home page grid.
creator: ryan.porter
